user.title: myBuderus Login
user.description:
**Step by step:**

1. Open this link in your browser: [{auth_url}]({auth_url})
2. Log in with your SingleKey ID credentials
3. After login an error page will appear in the browser — this is expected
4. Open the developer console (F12) → Network tab
5. Filter for `com.buderus` and copy the full redirect URL
6. Paste the URL or just the `code` parameter below

reauth_confirm.title: myBuderus — Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description:
Your session has expired.

1. Open this link: [{auth_url}]({auth_url})
2. Log in
3. Copy the redirect URL from DevTools (Network tab → `com.buderus`)

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Please check your internet connection.
